title: Cisco SD-WAN Zero-Day Exploited Since 2023
summary: CVE-2026-20127 (CVSS 10.0) authentication bypass in Cisco SD-WAN. CISA issued Emergency Directive ED 26-03.

title: Microsoft Patches 59 Flaws Including Six Zero-Days
summary: Six actively exploited zero-days patched in February Patch Tuesday. CISA KEV deadline March 3.

title: AI-Assisted Actor Compromises 600+ FortiGate Devices in 55 Countries
summary: Threat actor used commercial AI tools to breach FortiGate devices in 55 countries. Milestone case of AI-lowered attack barrier.

title: Apple Patches Sophisticated Zero-Day in Targeted Spyware Attacks
summary: CVE-2026-20700 memory buffer overflow. Possible commercial spyware involvement.

title: ScarCruft (APT37) Deploys New Toolkit for Air-Gapped Networks
summary: North Korea's APT37 launched Ruby Jumper campaign with USB-based air-gap bridging malware.

title: CrowdStrike Reports 89% Increase in AI-Enabled Adversary Activity
summary: 2026 Global Threat Report shows rapid rise in AI-powered attacks and social engineering.

title: Darktrace: Shift to AI-Enabled Credential Abuse
summary: Fundamental shift from exploit-driven to credential-based intrusions. AI enabling adaptive attacks.

title: TROOPERS26
summary: Top-tier technical security conference in Heidelberg.

title: DEF CON Group Monthly Meetup
summary: Local DEF CON group meetup with technical talks and community networking.
